HOW IT WORKS

Teach it your voice. Set your targets. Walk away.

From a short recording to fully autonomous outreach, GhostPost mirrors how you actually speak and act.

🎙

Record your voice

Speak naturally for two minutes. Whisper transcription and NLP extracts your vocabulary, tone, sentence patterns, and topics.

🔗

Connect accounts

Log into Instagram, LinkedIn, or X through the visible browser. Cookie sessions persist - no API keys or developer accounts.

🎯

Define targets

Pick verticals, locations, and message templates. GhostPost searches, qualifies leads, and queues personalised outreach.

👁

Watch or walk away

The browser streams live. Take control to solve CAPTCHAs or respond. Or close your laptop - GhostPost keeps working.

CAPABILITIES

Not a scheduler. Not a bot. A digital twin.

Designed to behave like you do, with observability and control built in.

🧠

Voice-learned personality

Your voice profile shapes every message - vocabulary, sentence length, punctuation habits, emoji usage, topics you gravitate to.

🖥

Visible browser

A real Chromium instance streams to your dashboard. Not headless. Not hidden. You see every click, scroll, and keystroke.

⏱

Circadian rhythm engine

Eight time-window personas model a real daily pattern - morning commute energy, post-lunch dip, evening wind-down.

✍️

Human typing simulation

Gaussian keystroke intervals. Occasional typos with backspace corrections. Bezier mouse curves with overshoot.

🛡

Anti-detection architecture

Stealth fingerprinting, residential proxy rotation, Poisson-distributed action timing. Built to pass ML behavioural analysis.

📊

Lead qualification

Built-in business vertical mapping with 70+ categories. Auto-classifies leads as target, conditional, or skip.

WHY GHOSTPOST

The gap between you and a bot is everything

GhostPostDM toolsManual

Runs autonomously while you sleep✓✓–
Account safety by design✓–✓

Your voice. Their inbox. Zero effort.

GhostPost is in private beta. Create your account and start running outreach in under two minutes.
